zh.lifeSummary: Margaret於大約1600年出生在英國英格蘭。她於大約1622年與Samuel Wright在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret于大约1600年出生在英国英格兰。她于大约1622年与Samuel Wright在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born about 1600, in England, United Kingdom. She married Samuel Wright about 1622, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 25 July 1681, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret est née environ 1600, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Samuel Wright environ 1622, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1681, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 대략 1600년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1622년 영국에서 Samuel Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 7월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Samuel Wright aproximadamente 1622, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1681, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась около 1600 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Wright около 1622 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 25 июля 1681 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret nació aproximadamente 1600, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Samuel Wright aproximadamente 1622, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1681, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años.
